Archive

SEFortress

[LOG: 17.10.20XX]

The Eye of the Storm is such a peaceful place, it should be archived.

The Ocean is a vast unmonitored place, neglected at all times. There is not much known about it, all the data combined would not even sum up to a mere fraction of what has yet to be discovered. One such entity of the unknown is the Storm Eye Fortress (SEF). SEF is a nonstationary structure resembling a great fortress straight out of a fantasy verse. It can be located at the centre of the Eye of SEF01, a cyclone first discovered by a Research and Exploration ship that was meant to survey the Glacial Regions of Antarctica but had to abort the mission after coming across it. Ships can go through most brutual conditions and still remain unscathed. Indeed the cyclone was not the only reason for shutting the mission down, it was the anomalies which SEF01 had to offer. Magnetic Anomalies were observed and the intensity increased as the ship approached closer. At one point the intensity was high enough that it started to effect the functioning of the electrical devices onboard. With the already punishing waves, the risk of permanent damage to imperative research equipments was not seen as a favourable situation, which led to mission abortion. This happened around March of 1996, the data collected was peculiar and thus raised the interest of certain parties into the situation. SEF01 now was being observed by the means of satellites and reconnaissance aircrafts. And the data collected over the period of few months was not by any means ordinary, it was obvious that this was not a regular cyclone that they were dealing with, the fact of SEF01 even being a cyclone waivered doubts.

According to the data collected, SEF01 moved randomly in the southern region of Pacific and the Indian Ocean and was around 150kms wide, showed no signs of dissipation overtime and was unaltered by any physical conditions. It was an unnatural existence, first of its kind. This was enough for a new mission to be organized. An Aviation Mission, where they sent a Lockheed Orion into SEF01 which was a regular job for it. The mission commenced on the 3rd of August, nearly 6 months after the first incident with SEF01. The documents provided do not give much information about the crew involved or other specifications. Skipping past the miscellaneous details, after 4 hours of flight, the first visual confirmation of SEF01 was reported. Soon the plane started to experience the turbulence. The equipments being used this time were anti-mag coated so the anomaly did not pose much of a threat. The magnetic anomaly was increasing in intensity. At ETA 45s the intensity started to fluctuate and show periodic declination. It was as if the there was a kind of barrier that they were about to cross.

The white started to clear off as they were going to enter the eye region in mere moments, prepared with cameras for collecting visual data. The white cleared off revealing a perfect blue sky as the warm sunrays made their way into the cockpit and lit up the small interior. SEF01 was a decent sized cyclone, and its Eye was 30kms in diameter. The view was surreal, how the storm was wreaking havoc outside but inside was a serene sky. The crew probably had seen that view quite a few times in their career. They started to follow their protocols as they were supposed to until the radar started to blink and display a small dot on screen. This was not expected, it’s not common to stumble upon another aircraft in the middle of a cyclone. There was not a single thing visible, but the radar kept showing the dot and how fast the plane was approaching it. Just when they were less than a kilometre from the blinking dot, a shadow covered the plane blocking all the sunlight. The crew gazed for the first time in a while towards the sky, there it was, a massive dome like structure, far up there in the sky perfectly centered with the Eye of SEF01. It was hovering slowly with respect to the velocity of the cyclone and spanned atleast 1500m wide. The grand size of it could easily dwarf the tallest buildings till this date. The plane was not at a very high altitude at that time, it was flying at 750m from sea-level. The unknown structure was roughly at the altitude of 2000m.

They circled around the dome, observing the unreal structure. The data collected was valuable. This mission was already a topic of interest among many and the footages of what they found in there sent waves throughout the organization. The military of course had to get involved. Intel of the incidents occurring around SEF01 and the involvement of military was not disclosed to public. The research on SEF01 was now being done by a joint military-research alliance formed by the countries involved with it.

A lot of new information about SEF had been collected overtime. It has been observed to emit signals in various short-wave frequencies. Most of the signals are encrypted and possibly none of them have been decrypted till now. Mysteriously SEF does not appear on satellite images despite of being at the center of the Eye, a region with negligible obstructions. It does not pose an imminent threat to the world right now, being thousands of kilometers away from the nearest major cities. Not any kind of signs of it being a military weapon of another nation has been found. Aircrafts are not allowed to approach it too closely due to equipment malfunctioning. The closest approach was done by a UAV during one of the regular reconnaissance missions. It managed to get great visuals of the fortress.

There were multiple recordings and images of SEF. It is estimated to be 250m in vertical height and 1580m wide. There are lot of pseudo-openings in the structure, resembling huge windows in various dimensions, ranging from 5m to 30m in height. Huge balconies the size of football fields stretched out of the main body at multiple levels. The whole Fortress was shining bright under the sun majestically, enough to blind the eyes. Small clouds covered the structure at different levels. The UAV circled around taking footages of the unreal scenery. Yet there was no sign of a single life or an entry into SEF. This mission was carried out around some time during July 2005, and no such reconnaissance mission has been performed since then. No high resolution footages have been provided, perhaps future missions might provide them, and for now the grainy footage quality where vaguely any details can be made out is the best we have.
